findings: Flow mapping: AC-1..AC-6 are browser/CLI-testable; AC-7 is backend-only (status --all JSON regression guard, no UI surface) — no E2E test applicable, covered by phase-8 integration tests

Wrote 10 Playwright tests in tests/e2e/KEEL-104-dashboard.spec.ts — real Chromium against real spawned servers: `node bin/keel.js dashboard --port=7891` (repo state) plus scripts/keel-dashboard.cjs on ports 7892 (empty fixture), 7893 (XSS fixture), 7772 (default)
Runner: `npx playwright test tests/e2e/KEEL-104-dashboard.spec.ts --reporter=list` — verbatim result '10 passed (21.8s)', 0 failed, 0 skipped

AC-1: startup stdout contained 'Dashboard: http://localhost:7891' via keel CLI, and 'Dashboard: http://localhost:7772' with no --port flag; default-port server served the dashboard with footer 'Port 7772'

AC-2: table renders all 4 stories with 6 columns (Story ID/Title/Scope/Current Phase/Status/Idle Time); KEEL-104 row shows title, scope 'feature', 'Phase 9 — E2E Engineer', IN PROGRESS badge rgb(217,119,6); KEEL-101/102/103 show COMPLETE badges rgb(22,163,74); all idle cells match /^(\d+h \d+m|\d+m \d+s|unknown)$/
AC-3: row order asserted as KEEL-104, KEEL-103, KEEL-102, KEEL-101 — matches manifest updated_at descending
AC-4: live DOM contains meta[http-equiv=refresh] with content='30'
AC-5: --port=7891 override honored end-to-end (stdout, HTTP bind, footer 'Port 7891')
AC-6: server started from a cwd with no .keel/state shows 'No stories found.' + 'keel init <story-id>' hint, header '0 stories', zero table elements
XSS safety: manifest title '' rendered as literal text in the title cell; 0 script elements, 0 img elements, 0 dialogs fired
404 handling: GET /nonexistent returned status 404 with body 'Not found' via both APIRequestContext and browser navigation
No JS console errors or pageerrors captured in any tested flow (listeners attached before navigation in each flow)
Evidence on disk: 4 screenshots + 2 startup-stdout captures under docs/e2e-evidence/KEEL-104/; screenshots visually verified (table, empty state, escaped XSS payload)

Environment fix during session: chromium_headless_shell-1228 binary was missing (first run failed 9/10 on browserType.launch); ran `npx playwright install chromium`, re-run passed 10/10 — no test or app code relaxed
Cleanup verified: netstat shows no listeners left on ports 7772/7891/7892/7893 after the run (process trees killed in afterAll)
decisions: AC-7 (keel-state.cjs status --all byte-compatibility) has no browser surface — no E2E test fabricated; it was regression-verified in phase 8 via direct CLI integration test and keel-dashboard.cjs never touches keel-state.cjs (ADR-003)

Used semantic selectors (thead th, tbody tr, td:nth-child) instead of adding data-testid attributes — the server-rendered page is a single stable table and adding testids would modify generateHTML after phase-8 QA sign-off for zero functional benefit

Empty-state and XSS scenarios run real spawned servers with process.cwd() pointed at temp-dir fixtures (dashboard resolves .keel/state from cwd) — real repo state is never touched; fixtures removed in afterAll

Servers spawned/killed inside the spec (beforeAll/afterAll with Windows taskkill /T for the keel.js->dashboard process tree) rather than a playwright.config webServer, because four distinct server contexts (CLI wrapper, empty, XSS, default-port) are needed in one suite
